assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- A. Golden Path A1: purchaseMachine returns a valid assembly_line
assertionResults.title: A1: purchaseMachine returns a valid assembly_line

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- A. Golden Path A2: initializeStarterMachines creates assembly_line + conveyor_system
assertionResults.title: A2: initializeStarterMachines creates assembly_line + conveyor_system

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- A. Golden Path A3: process with empty decisions still ages machines and calculates costs
assertionResults.title: A3: process with empty decisions still ages machines and calculates costs

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B1: purchasing an unknown machine type returns failure
assertionResults.title: B1: purchasing an unknown machine type returns failure

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B2: scheduled maintenance restores health
assertionResults.title: B2: scheduled maintenance restores health

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B3: emergency maintenance restores more health than scheduled
assertionResults.title: B3: emergency maintenance restores more health than scheduled

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B4: major_overhaul sets machine status to maintenance
assertionResults.title: B4: major_overhaul sets machine status to maintenance

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B5: machine aging degrades health over many rounds
assertionResults.title: B5: machine aging degrades health over many rounds

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B6: calculateLaborReduction compounds correctly for operational machines
assertionResults.title: B6: calculateLaborReduction compounds correctly for operational machines

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B7: calculateLaborReduction ignores offline machines
assertionResults.title: B7: calculateLaborReduction ignores offline machines

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B8: calculateDefectRateImpact sums operational machines only
assertionResults.title: B8: calculateDefectRateImpact sums operational machines only

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B9: calculateShippingReduction compounds correctly
assertionResults.title: B9: calculateShippingReduction compounds correctly

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B10: getMaintenanceRecommendations categorizes low-health machines as urgent
assertionResults.title: B10: getMaintenanceRecommendations categorizes low-health machines as urgent

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B11: empty machines array produces valid results
assertionResults.title: B11: empty machines array produces valid results

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B12: process with empty machines array returns zero capacity
assertionResults.title: B12: process with empty machines array returns zero capacity

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B13: machine set offline skips degradation
assertionResults.title: B13: machine set offline skips degradation

assertionResults.fullName: MachineryEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B14: process handles purchase + immediate maintenance in same round
assertionResults.title: B14: process handles purchase + immediate maintenance in same round
